# Support

Thanks for using Private AI Platform Kit. This page routes you to the right place.

## Questions and how-to help

Start with the docs:

- [Quickstart](../docs/quickstart.md) for a first local run.
- [Decision guide](../docs/decision-guide.md) to check whether this kit fits your use case.
- [Operational runbooks](../README.md#docs) — the docs and runbooks index in the README.

If the docs do not answer your question, open a discussion in the repository's
**Discussions** tab. If Discussions is not enabled, open an issue using the
**Question** template instead.

## Bugs and feature requests

Open a GitHub issue:

- Reproducible problems: use the **Bug report** template.
- Proposals and enhancements: use the **Feature request** template.

Larger design changes are best raised as an issue before implementation. See
[CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md) for the contributor workflow.

## Security issues

Do not open a public issue for a vulnerability, secret, exploit detail, customer
data, or private prompt content. Follow [SECURITY.md](../SECURITY.md) to report
privately through GitHub Private Vulnerability Reporting or the security contact
listed there.

## Conduct concerns

Reporting and enforcement are covered in [CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md](../CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md).
